channel.title: Reviews in Chemical Engineering
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Reviews in Chemical Engineering

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by André Ribeiro, Frederico Montes, João Sousa, Alberto Pais DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revce-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: Comprehensive and in-depth insights into photo-assisted halogenation reactions: a pharmaceutical industry perspective
item.description: Article by André Ribeiro, Frederico Montes, João Sousa, Alberto Pais DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revce-2024-0021

item.title: Gas–liquid upflow packed bed reactors: a comprehensive review focused on heat transport
item.description: Article by André Ribeiro, Frederico Montes, João Sousa, Alberto Pais DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revce-2024-0035

item.title: Research progress of jet washing technology and its exploratory decoking application in delayed coking process
item.description: Article by André Ribeiro, Frederico Montes, João Sousa, Alberto Pais DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revce-2024-0030

item.title: Comminution technologies in the pharmaceutical industry: a comprehensive review with recent advances
item.description: Article by André Ribeiro, Frederico Montes, João Sousa, Alberto Pais DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/revce-2024-0059
